digest.en: US President Trump said Iran can call the US if it wants to negotiate. Iran's foreign minister meanwhile returned to Pakistan after US envoys' trip was canceled. Israel and Hezbollah traded strikes in Lebanon as Iran talks remain on hold.
digest.hi: शिकागो के एक अस्पताल में गोलीबारी हुई, जिसमें एक पुलिसकर्मी की मौत हो गई। माली में जिहादी हमले में रक्षा मंत्री सादियो कैमारा की मौत हो गई, जो सैन्य सरकार के लिए बड़ा झटका है। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे।

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call U.S. if it wants to negotiate
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi discussed security in the Strait of Hormuz with Oman officials. Iran FM back in Pakistan after Oman visit, says report; Iran's Foreign ​Minister Abbas Araghchi ‌held talks in ​Oman, discussed security ‌in the Strait of Hormuz, ‌broader ⁠Gulf waters, ⁠and diplomatic efforts to end the ​Iran-U. S.

articles.title: Trump Event Shooter Mocked Hotel Security In Manifesto, Said 'Won't Use Slugs'
articles.summary: Trump stated the shooter acted alone as a "lone wolf". The suspect had mocked hotel security in a manifesto. Trump said officials believed he acted alone and was what he called a "lone wolf".

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U.S. envoys' trip canceled
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister returned to Pakistan after a US envoy trip was canceled. Live Updates: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S. envoys' trip canceled CBS News. Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S.

articles.title: Mystery surrounds fate of detained journalist six months after fall of key Sudan city
articles.summary: Six months after the Rapid Support Forces captured Al Fashir, a detained journalist's fate remains unknown. Six months have passed since the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) captured the Sudanese regional capital Al Fashir and shared dozens of videos documenting their massacre in the city.

articles.title: Gunman sought to kill Trump, cabinet at gala dinner
articles.summary: Cole Allen wrote a note ranking targets, including Trump and his cabinet, by priority. Publications have shared a note written by suspect Cole Allen that ranked potential targets from highest to lowest priority.

articles.title: Champions-in-waiting Inter held to 2-2 draw as Torino fight back
articles.summary: Inter was held to a 2-2 draw by Torino after the opposing team fought back. Champions-in-waiting Inter held to 2-2 draw as Torino fight back.

articles.title: Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War
articles.summary: Xi Jinping proposed Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War. The initiatives were outlined in an article on Modern Diplomacy. Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War Modern Diplomacy.

articles.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
articles.summary: Israel's President Isaac Herzog will not pardon Benjamin Netanyahu. Instead, he will seek a plea deal in Netanyahu's corruption case. President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

articles.title: Taiwan will not 'bow its head': FM hits out at China during visit to Eswatini
articles.summary: Taiwan's foreign minister said the country will not bow to China's pressure during a visit to Eswatini. “No unreasonable blockade or pressure can shake our resolve and will to safeguard our dignity and connect with the international community,” he added.

articles.title: First trial of Assad-era Syrian official starts in Damascus
articles.summary: Syria's first public trial of a former Assad-era official, Atef Najib, has started in Damascus. Syria begun its first public trial of former Assad-era officials, with ex-security chief Atef Najib appearing in court.

articles.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint
articles.summary: India hosted a BRICS deputy foreign ministers' meeting, but a joint statement couldn't be agreed upon due to differences between UAE and Iran, and India on Israel-Palestine language. A 'Chair's Statement' was issued instead.

articles.title: Iran FM Abbas Araghchi Meets Asim Munir After Landing In Islamabad
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with Pakistani army chief Asim Munir in Islamabad after visiting Oman. Araghchi arrived at Nur Khan Airbase in Rawalpindi. The Iranian leader arrived at Nur Khan Airbase in Rawalpindi after completing a day-long visit to Oman.

articles.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi continued diplomatic efforts over the weekend, but US President Donald Trump scrapped a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, casting doubt on US-Iran peace hopes. The stalemate risks escalating tensions without a deal.

articles.title: Russia, North Korea agree 'long-term' military cooperation
articles.summary: Russia and North Korea have agreed on long-term military cooperation, with a defense deal and memorial inauguration marking the agreement. Russia's defense minister and the chairman of the State Duma are both visiting North Korea.

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call if it wants to talk, as Iranian envoy returns to Pakistan
articles.summary: US President Trump said Iran can contact him if it wants to talk, as the Iranian envoy returned to Pakistan after calling off planned negotiations. Trump offered to talk or meet.

articles.title: Amid Iran's Attacks, UAE Called For Help. Israel Responded With Iron Dome
articles.summary: Israel deployed the Iron Dome to help the UAE counter Iran's attacks, which included 550 ballistic and cruise missiles and over 2,200 drones. The UAE had requested assistance. Iran struck the UAE with 550 ballistic and cruise missiles, and over 2,200 drones.

articles.title: What to Know About King Charles and Queen Camilla’s U.S. State Visit Hosted by Trump
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla of Britain are set to visit the US for a state visit hosted by President Trump, with events including a garden party, a congressional address, and a banquet. The visit starts on Monday.

articles.title: Colombia highway bomb attack kills at least 19
articles.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced plans to expand Israel's control in Lebanon, ordering more evacuations in the region. The move comes as a ceasefire appears to be cracking, with violence escalating in the area.

articles.title: Ceasefire cracking, Israel looks to spread area of control in Lebanon, orders more evacuations
articles.summary: Israel has ordered more evacuations in Lebanon as it seeks to expand its control in the region. The move follows reports of a ceasefire cracking, with violence escalating in the area.

articles.title: Why Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza
articles.summary: Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza, expanding its control in the region and sidelining the new US-backed technocratic administration. The move marks a significant shift in Israel's approach to the Gaza Strip.

articles.title: शिकागो के अस्पताल में गोलीबारी, एक पुलिसकर्मी की मौत; माली में जिहादी हमला, रक्षा मंत्री की मौत

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा
articles.summary: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में आर्थिक युद्ध की स्थिति बन गई है। यह क्षेत्र महत्वपूर्ण है क्योंकि यहां से बहुत सारा तेल और गैस का व्यापार होता है। विचार: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा Jagran।

articles.title: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे, ट्रंप ने कहा- युद्ध जल्द ख़त्म होगा
articles.summary: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे। इससे पहले वह अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले ओमान चले गए थे। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान वापस लौटे हैं, जबकि अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले वो ओमान चले गए थे.

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर कर सकते हैं बात; फिर नाटो पर भड़के अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर बात कर सकते हैं। इसके बाद उन्होंने नाटो पर टिप्पणी की और कहा कि यह संगठन पुराना हो गया है। ट्रंप की टिप्पणियों से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम होने की संभावना है।

articles.summary: नेपाल के बालेन शाह ने चीन के साथ हुए समझौतों की समीक्षा की है. इसके पीछे एक बड़ा रणनीतिक खेल चल रहा था या नहीं, यह सवाल उठने लगे हैं. नेपाल की सत्ता बदलने के साथ ही पुराने समझौतों के राज खुलने लगे हैं.

articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं। एक रिपोर्ट में दावा किया गया है कि दोनों देशों के बीच शांति के प्रयास जारी हैं। रिपोर्ट में दी गई जानकारी के अनुसार शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं।

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।

articles.title: थाइवान मामलों का कार्यालय: एकीकरण ही थाइवान का एकमात्र भविष्य है

articles.title: विशेष वीडियो, अंतरराष्ट्रीय संबंध विशेषज्ञ तिया मारियातुल् किब्तिया: इंडोनेशिया की विदेश नीति को
